fingerprint_summary: ASP.NET WebForms real-property search; UpdatePanel async grid; columns FileNumber/FileDate/Type/Names/LegalDescription; Grantor/Grantee detail sub-rows. Local Playwright (+--no-sandbox) parses 200 records/page. Document images behind paid 'image on demand' even when logged in.
notes: Operator login works (activated) but NOT required for search metadata. No case number, no street address, no public PDF on detail page — OCR path dead; HCAD clerk_id bridge is the address path.
